scope: Starships of the Galaxy implementation source-review list

items.name: Starship Tactics
items.description: Adds Starship Maneuvers to the Starship Maneuver Suite equal to 1 + Wisdom modifier, minimum 1; repeatable; Gunnery Specialist has an alternate Gunner-only selection rule.
items.reason: The metadata shape is right, but implemented_correct requires verifying the actual maneuver picker, repeatable grant storage, and Gunnery Specialist alternate qualification behavior.

items.name: Tactical Genius
items.description: Regain all spent Starship Maneuvers at the end of any round in which the character rolls a natural 20 on an attack roll.
items.reason: The catalog has correct metadata, but implemented_correct requires an actual natural-20 attack-roll trigger plus starship maneuver spent-state recovery.
